results.rendered_html:
dvāra(ri)kā N. of the capital of Kṛṣṇa on the western point of Gujarāth; (for a description of Dvārakā, see  Śi. 3. 33-63 )
Comp.
— īśaḥ, -nāthaḥ, -patiḥ epithets of Kṛṣṇa.
